title: Storage Full and Slowness
drDigitalIntro: Mac running slow: check storage (System Settings > General > Storage). If full, delete old files, apps you don't use, or old downloads. Too many open apps slow things down — close unnecessary ones. Restart your Mac — it's remarkable how often that fixes slowness. If still slow, check Activity Monitor for apps using too much CPU or memory.
drDigitalSuccess: You can speed up your Mac!
drDigitalHint: Delete old downloads — they pile up and slow you down.
